Serving IE · LA · OC · SoCal

ABOUT YOUR DRIVER

A better ride, every ride.

Drive Direct was created to offer a more personal and affordable alternative to traditional rideshare services. By connecting riders directly with their driver, customers receive more reliable service, better communication, and lower pricing — without the added platform markups.

  • ✓ 11+ Years Experience
  • ✓ Same Driver Every Ride
  • ✓ Direct Communication — No Silent or Awkward Rides
  • ✓ Safety-Focused & Reliable
  • ✓ Comfortable, Professional Experience
  • ✓ Strong Customer Relationships & Repeat Riders
  • ✓ Reliable Scheduled Pickups
  • ✓ Better Rates Than Traditional Rideshare
4.97 ★ Rating on Major Rideshare Platform
